title: Creamed Blocks
description: Allows you to apply magma cream to a block and it will prevent snow from laying on that block.
body:
This mod is very small and simple, you can right click a block (any block) with Magma Cream and it will "cream" that block. This will cause the game to not be able to lay snow on that block.
To "un-cream" a block, you simply right-click it with an axe and it will remove the cream.

This does not come with any visual difference, however when you are near the block and holding magma cream in your hand, it will render a magma cream above that block in the world.

This mod also comes with some commands that let you interact with the creamed blocks. These are:

- `/creamedblocks query [x] [y] [z]` (This command allows you to see whether a block at a specific position is creamed.)

- `/creamedblocks reload` (This command will reload all of the creamed blocks in your current dimension, this will only be useful if there happens to be a desync.)

- `/creamedblocks set [true/false] [x] [y] [z]`
(This command allows you to set (true) and remove (false) a block to/from being creamed.)

- `/creamedblocks reset` (This command will reset all of the creamed blocks (currently globally but eventually per dimension))
